sentences.arabic: جَاءَ رَجُلٌ إِلَى النَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ يَسْتَأْذِنُهُ فِي الْجِهَادِ، فَقَالَ لَهُ: «أَحَيٌّ وَالِدَاكَ؟»
sentences.translation: Došao je čovjek kod Poslanika, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, tražeći dozvolu za džihad, pa mu on reče: 'Jesu li ti roditelji živi?'
sentences.translationEn: A man came to the Prophet (PBUH) asking permission to participate in Jihad, and he asked him: 'Are your parents alive?'

sentences.arabic: قَالَ: «فَفِيهِمَا فَجَاهِدْ» [رَوَاهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ الْجِهَادِ، حَدِيثُ رَقْمِ ٣٠٠٤].
sentences.translation: On reče: 'Onda se u njima bori (trudi se oko njih)' [Buhari].
sentences.translationEn: He said: 'Then strive in their service' [Buhari].

sentences.arabic: يُعَلِّمُنَا هَذَا الْحَدِيثُ أَنَّ بِرَّ الْوَالِدَيْنِ مِنَ أَعْظَمِ الْأَعْمَالِ عِنْدَ اللَّهِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj hadis nas uči da je dobročinstvo prema roditeljima jedno od najvećih djela kod Allaha.
sentences.translationEn: This hadith teaches us that being dutiful to parents is one of the greatest deeds in the sight of Allah.

sentences.arabic: خِدْمَةُ الْأُمِّ وَالْأَبِ وَطَاعَتُهُمَا تُعَادِلُ أَجْرًا كَبِيرًا جِدًّا.
sentences.translation: Služenje majci i ocu i pokornost njima vrijede veoma veliku nagradu.
sentences.translationEn: Serving one's mother and father and obeying them is equivalent to a very great reward.

sentences.arabic: الْمُسْلِمُ الْحَقُّ هُوَ مَنْ يُكْرِمُ وَالِدَيْهِ وَيُحْسِنُ إِلَيْهِمَا دَائِمًا.
sentences.translation: Pravi musliman je onaj koji poštuje svoje roditelje i uvijek im čini dobro.
sentences.translationEn: A true Muslim is one who honors his parents and always treats them with kindness.
